servers.name: ie.righttostay/mcp
servers.title: righttostay.ie — Irish Tenancy Rights
servers.description: Free public MCP server for Irish tenancy rights. Plain-language answers in 14 languages, grounded in RTB decisions and Threshold guidance. No API key. EU AI Act Art 50 (§52) disclosure on every AI-generated response. EU-resident hosting (europe-west1).
